sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الطَّعَامُ طَازَجًا وَشَكَا الزَّبُونُ.
sentences.translation: Hrana nije bila svježa i gost se žalio.
sentences.translationEn: The food was not fresh and the customer complained.

sentences.translation: Pozvao je konobara i rekao mu o problemu.
sentences.translationEn: He called the waiter and told him about the problem.

sentences.translation: Konobar se ispričao i donio novi tanjir.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter apologized and brought a new dish.

sentences.translation: Gost je prihvatio i mirno jeo.
sentences.translationEn: The customer accepted and ate calmly.
